item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like this, it's cute and fun.

Extremely minor nitpick: I don't think it's technically possible to be in a geostationary orbit around the Moon. The Moon's slow rotation means that your orbit would have to be really big, and its low mass (relative to the Earth) means an orbit big enough would put you more in Earth's gravity well than in the Moon's. That doesn't mean the ship couldn't be hovering over the Taco Bell, of course, just that it wouldn't be in an orbit there.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You know, I was looking for a way of shoehorning that into this SCP, and now that you mention it, I think that phrase would be a very fitting name for this article. Thank you!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My only regret is the absence of the obvious "good food; no atmosphere" joke, although really, I guess the whole article implies it by its very nature. This was a fun read, though, and the final incident log really makes it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Taco Bell, Taco Bell, product placement with (anomalous) Taco Bell.
Damn, now I'm hungry.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Dude, I swear, we’re so far out here the nearest
Taco Bell is probably on Mars or something.
- A wise friend
̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶ ̶

Thanks to cybersqyd and Zyn for critique help, and ShamrockJolnes for the article name inspiration.

I scribbled down this idea somewhere a few months back, stumbled upon it somewhat recently and decided to revive it. This article’s gone through numerous overhauls over the course of the creative process, so big thanks to everyone who helped out and stuck around through it all and rest in peace to the creative menu item names that didn’t survive the switch from Mars to the Moon, and the article's original name: "Taco Bell But It's On The F*cking Moon.". I hope you all enjoy it as much as I enjoyed writing it. :)

(Aaaaaaand it looks like this is now my highest-rated page, even higher than my oldest article and my 5K Contest entry. Thank you, all!)

The image provided is in the public domain courtesy of NASA/JPL-Caltech. I cropped and edited the original image to include a random building as seen from above, taken via a friend of mine’s drone. The base image can be found here.
